name: Crab Cakes
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Crabmeat, lump, picked to remove small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a non-reactive mixing bowl, stir together the mayonnaise, mustard, egg, lemon juice, Tabasco sauce, and Worcestershire sauce.
2. Add the finely chopped red pepper and diced onion to the mixture.
3. Pour the mayonnaise mixture over the crabmeat in another bowl, then add enough bread crumbs to bind the mixture so it can be formed into cakes without becoming dry.
4. Form the mixture into cakes of the desired size.
5. Coat each cake with additional bread crumbs.
6. Heat olive oil in a pan and cook the cakes until they are light golden in color.
7. Transfer the cakes to an oven preheated to 400°F (200°C) and bake for 3-5 minutes.
